details: Potential-connectivity graph remains component-based, but corridor/barrier length now affects scores, impedance, strength and edge class
Added adv_rail_local_km and node-level adv_rail_local_km_incident; rail score is distance score multiplied by local-length factor
Added adv_navigable_river_local_km and node-level adv_navigable_river_local_km_incident; navigable river score is length-weighted
Added adv_relief_barrier_km and adv_main_watershed_barrier_km; rельефный and водораздельный impedance now depend on local barrier expression
Added choropleth modes for local length of rail, road, navigable river, relief barrier and main watershed barrier incident to units
Advanced edge tooltip now shows local corridor/barrier lengths
Updated connectivity_method_v138.json with length-weighted component method
node --check app.js OK; selected GeoJSON/JSON files parsed OK; ZIP verified
